items.title: EU bans gold imports from Sudan to curb money financing the war

items.summary: 韋黛琴（Ann Widdecombe）上週在德文郡家中被發現身亡。她生前是英國改革黨（Reform UK）發言人，在此之前於保守黨歷任政府或影子內閣不同職位。
items.title: 英國改革黨發言人韋黛琴命案變反恐調查 一文掌握來龍去脈

items.summary: India won the first women's Test at Lord's, 142 years after its first men's Test.
items.title: How India's Lord's win echoes the legacy of its pioneering women cricketers

items.summary: Simon Andriesz made the discovery about Howard Lutnick in publicly released Epstein files.
items.title: How US commerce secretary's Epstein links were uncovered by British whistleblower

items.summary: 中國官方新華社公佈，中共政治局委員、前新疆黨委書記馬興瑞被開除黨籍、開除公職處分，即「雙開」。
items.title: 「雙開」馬興瑞：習時代「技術官僚」代表隕落，政治局三委員落馬

items.summary: Survivors and first responders reported locked doors and a lack of signage marking emergency exits.
items.title: Bangkok fire investigation finds locked doors and flammable decor as deaths climb to 30
